name: re-minko
description: Платформа для просмотра аниме и манги с AI помощником Minko

scripts.automate:anime: npm run build:kodik && node scripts/build/anime-automation.js && npm run build:sitemap
scripts.automate:anime:enrich: npm run build:kodik && node scripts/build/anime-automation.js --enrich-missing --limit=80 && npm run build:sitemap
scripts.automate:anime:api: npm run fetch:kodik && npm run automate:anime
scripts.automate:anime:api:enrich: npm run fetch:kodik && npm run automate:anime:enrich
scripts.minify: npm run minify:js && npm run minify:css
